title: Barely Boosted
description: Barely Boosted delivers an optimized, expansive Minecraft experience. Enjoy Distant Horizons, enhanced QoL, and vast new Dungeons, Taverns, and Amplified dimensions, all while retaining a vanilla feel.
body:
# **Vanilla feel. Infinite views. Zero bloat.**

Barely Boosted is built for players who want the modern Minecraft experience without sacrificing performance. The core gameplay loop remains intact, but the world is now significantly more immersive and actually worth exploring.

## - Performance & Visuals 
1. Voxy: Voxy takes the lead here instead of Distant Horizons to deliver massive, highly performant LODs (Level of Detail). You can see for miles without melting your GPU
2. Fresh Animations: Mobs now move like living creatures rather than stiff cardboard boxes, thanks to FreshLX’s animation overhaul.
3. FPS Optimization: A curated suite of performance mods ensures high framerates even with the expanded terrain.
    

## - Quality of Life
1. Inventory Management: Easy Shulker Boxes allow access to loot without placing the box.
2. Crafting Persistence: Crafting Tables and Enchanting Tables now hold items. No more spewing diamonds on the floor just because the UI was closed.
3. The "Easy" Suite: The pack features Easy Anvils and Easy Magic for a smoother progression experience that respects your time.
    

## - World Generation Overhaul
1. Overworld: Enhanced by Geophilic for subtle, beautiful terrain improvements that don't break the vanilla vibe, plus Dungeons and Taverns and a bunch of other structure mods that add a lot of variety to your world and also to increase things to raid.
2. The Nether (Incendium): A complete reimagining of the Nether with terrifying new biomes and structures.
3. The End (Stellarity): The End is no longer a barren wasteland. Experience a completely overhauled Ender Dragon fight, new biomes, and a reason to actually stay in the dimension.
4. Friends & Foes: Brings the "forgotten" mobs from Minecraft Mob Votes (Iceologer, Wildfire, Glare, etc.) back into the game where they belong.


## PS:
1. Voxy has an amazing support for Photon (search for Photon Voxy Support - Github). 
2. In Resource Packs, Add Fresh Animations first and the extensions for it on top of it



# Barely Boosted - Full Content List

###  Core, Performance & Optimization

* **Voxy** (The highlight: Massive LODs for infinite view distance)
* **Sodium** + **Sodium Extra** + **Reese's Sodium Options** (Rendering engine)
* **Lithium** (Server logic)
* **Very Many Players (VMP)** (High-count player server optimization)
* **FerriteCore** (Memory usage reduction)
* **Entity Culling** & **More Culling** (Don't render what you can't see)
* **ImmediatelyFast** (Rendering optimization)
* **Dynamic FPS** (Saves resources when tabbed out)
* **FastQuit** (Instant world saving/quitting)
* **Fast IP Ping** (Faster server list loading)
* **Language Reload** (Instant language switching)
* **ServerCore** (Server performance)
* **Remove Reloading Screen** (Smoother resource pack loading)
* **Debugify** & **Crash Assistant** (Bug fixes and crash analysis)
* **Respackopts** (Resource pack options)
* **Model Gap Fix** (Fixes gaps in item models)

###  World Generation & Structures

* **Geophilic** (Subtle vanilla biome improvements)
* **Incendium** (Nether overhaul)
* **Stellarity** (End overhaul & Dragon fight rework)
* **Trek** (World generation/biome expansion)
* **Dungeons and Taverns** (New structures)
* **Repurposed Structures** (Vanilla structures in new biomes)
* **Explorify** (Dungeon expansion)
* **Structory** (Atmospheric structures)
* **Moog's Voyager Structures** & **Moog's Structure Lib**
* **Katters Structures**
* **AdoraBuild: Structures**
* **Additional Structures**
* **Hopo Better Underwater Ruins**
* **Scorched** (Desert biome expansion)
* **Cubes Without Borders** (World border changes)

###  Quality of Life 

* **Easy Anvils** (Better repair costs/mechanics)
* **Easy Magic** (Enchanting table inventory persistence)
* **Easy Shulker Boxes** (Interact without placing)
* **Enchanting Infuser** (New enchanting station)
* **Villager Pickup** (Pick up villagers directly)
* **Villager Names** (Villagers get random names)
* **Universal Bone Meal** (Grow almost anything)
* **Visual Workbench** (Items stay on the crafting table)
* **Cut Through** (Hit enemies through grass)
* **Diagonal Fences** (Connect fences diagonally)
* **Mouse Tweaks** (Better inventory dragging)
* **Inventory Totem** (Totems work from inventory)
* **Pick Up Notifier** (Corner notifications for loot)
* **Leaves Be Gone** (Fast leaf decay)
* **FallingTree** (Tree chopping/timber mod)
* **NetherPortalFix** (Fixes portal linking)
* **Delete Worlds To Trash** (Safety net)
* **Cherished Worlds** (Pin/favorite worlds)

###  Resource Packs (Visual Overhaul)

* **Fresh Animations** (The complete suite: Core, Extensions, Objects, Player Extension)
* **Bare Bones** (The "Trailer" look - clean, simple textures)
* **Torches Reimagined** (Better fire/torch visuals)
* **Fresh Buckets** & **Fresh Food** (Item texture improvements)
* **Animated Items** (Items in inventory have animations)
* **(Bee's) Fancy Crops** (Better crop visuals)
* **3D Ladders** (Adds depth to ladders)
* **Simple Grass Flowers** (Grass adds subtle flowers)
* **Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD** (Dark mode/cleaner UI)
* **Fast Better Grass** (Performance-friendly grass connections)
* **Even Better Enchants** (Visual changes for enchanted books)
* **Armory Conglomery** (Armor texture tweaks)
* **Main Menu Panoramas** (Custom background)
* **Translations for Sodium** (Localization)

###  Visual Mods (Engine)

* **Iris Shaders** (Shader support)
* **Zoomify** (Zoom key)
* **[EMF] Entity Model Features** & **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** (Required for Fresh Animations)
* **3D Skin Layers** (Better player skins)
* **Not Enough Animations** & **Spawn Animations**
* **Tiny Skeletons** (Baby skeletons)
* **LambDynamicLights** & **Dynamic Lights** (Handheld lighting)
* **BetterGrassify** (Smoother grass)
* **Skyboxify** (Better sky rendering)
* **Animatica** (Animated textures)
* **Capes** (Cape support)
* **OptiGUI** (Custom GUI textures)
* **Continuity** (Connected textures)
* **Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks** (Visual fix)
* **Day Counter** (See days played)
* **Totem Bar** (Display stored totems)
* **Better Mount HUD** (Improved horse/mount UI)
* **Better Statistics Screen** & **Better Advancements**
* **Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames**
* **AppleSkin** (Food saturation visualization)

###  Gameplay, Content & Tools

* **Friends&Foes** (Adds Copper Golem, Glare, Iceologer, etc.)
* **Illager Invasion** (New Illager types)
* **Advanced Netherite** (New gear tiers)
* **Weapons Expanded** (New weapon types)
* **Better Tridents** (Trident mechanics)
* **Enchantments Encore** (New enchantments)
* **Elytra Trims** (Customize elytra)
* **Hang Glider** (Early game mobility)
* **Axiom** (Advanced building tools)
* **Litematica** (Schematic mod)
* **Chunky** (Pre-generate chunks to reduce lag)
* **Fabrishot** (High-res screenshots)
* **Xaero's World Map** (Full screen map)
* **Controlify** (Controller support)
* **e4mc** (Open LAN to public)
* **No Chat Reports** & **Chat Reporting Helper** (Privacy)

###  Libraries

* *Fabric API, Cloth Config, Architectury, YACL, TCDCommons, Puzzles Lib, Resourceful Lib, MidnightLib, MaLiLib, Balm, LibJF, Lithostitched, MixinTrace, Mod Menu (+Helper), etc.*
